creator: mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I was able to install and boot that same version/date of -current (albeit the disc1 version) using UTM 4.6.1 (beta) with the qemu (v9.1.0) backend. However, when I tried booting the same VM using UTM 4.5.4 with the qemu (v7.2.0) backend, it hung with this error:

No valid device tree blob found!
WARNING! Trying to fire up the kernel, but no device tree blob found!
EFI framebuffer information:
addr, size.  0x13bd00000, 0x300000
dimensions   800 x 600
stride       900
masks        0x00ff0000, 0x0000ff00, 0x000000ff, 0xff000000
<hang>

Not sure if this matches what you are seeing but try with UTM 4.6.1 to see what happens on your system. Doesn't address why it stopped working but is a data point.
